description: Validation test set for 4 sample conversations. Each conversation defines its turns (user messages) and the expected final order_state.items after all turns are played.

conversations.title: Smash Burger Combo with Modifiers
conversations.description: Smash burger (patty selection + combo fries + lettuce bun), then add-ons/holds, then sides/sauces/drinks, then swap/remove and finalize.

turns.user_message: Hey!
I want an All American burger.
Make that a double patty.
Make it a combo with Cajun Fries.
Actually switch the fries to Lemon Pepper Fries.
Add Beef Bacon and Jalepeno on the burger.
Can you make it medium-rare and cut it in half?
Also add Grilled Shaved Onion.
No sliced tomato and no pickles on that All American.
Add avocado and pepper jack too.
Do the Lettuce Bun on that burger.
Add an order of Animal Fries too.
For the Animal Fries, add Extra Smash Patty.
But hold the jalapeno on the Animal Fries.
Add a side of Mozzarella Sticks.
Add 2 Ranch sauces and 1 Hot Honey.
Make the drink a Glass Coke.
Actually can I get a Diet Dr Pepper instead?
Wait—remove the Mozzarella Sticks.
Swap the Glass Coke for a Can Sprite Zero.
Ok that’s it.

conversations.title: Crispy Chicken Meal with Spice Changes
conversations.description: Crispy chicken meal with spice levels and fry seasoning, plus desserts/drinks, then change mind multiple times.

turns.user_message: Hi, placing a pickup order.
Can I get 2 Chicken Tenders & Fries?
For the fries seasoning: Nashville Seasoning.
Tender spice level: Extra Spicy.
Actually make the tenders Mild instead.
Make the tenders extra crispy and add a side salad.
Add Jalapeño Poppers on the side.
And add Battered Onion Rings too.
Add a Can Coke Zero.
No ice in the Coke Zero.
Also add 2 Chocolate Chip cookies.
Change the drink to a Glass Sprite instead.
Remove the onion rings.
Add Animal Fries as well.
For the Animal Fries: No Thank You on extra patty.
Hold the smash sauce on the Animal Fries.
Add one sauce: Sweet n Spicy.
Actually make that two Sweet n Spicy sauces.
Cancel the Jalapeño Poppers.
Ok place it.

conversations.title: Boneless Wings Flavor & Combo Swaps
conversations.description: Boneless wings flavor selection + combo fries, then switch flavors, add sauces and drinks, then swap fries and remove an item.

turns.user_message: Yo!
I want 6Pc Boneless.
Flavor: Garlic Parm.
Make it a combo with Plain Fries.
Actually switch the fries to Nashville Seasoning Fries.
Change the flavor to Hot Honey.
Wait no—make it Spicy Garlic Parm instead.
Also make them grilled not fried.
Add a side of Regular Fries too.
For the Regular Fries seasoning: Salt and Pepper.
Add Buffalo sauce and Ranch.
Add one Chili Mango sauce as well.
Add a Can Diet Coke.
And throw in a bottle of water.
Also add Cookies ‘N Cream cookie.
Remove the extra Regular Fries.
Make the combo fries Cajun Fries now.
Add Mozzarella Sticks.
Actually cancel the Mozzarella Sticks.
Ok done.

conversations.title: Chicken Sub Combo, Cancel & Restart
conversations.description: Chicken sub with combo fries + add-ons, then full cancel and restart with a different complex order.

turns.user_message: Hello!
Get me the Chicken Sub (throwback to 2008).
For Extra Chicken: No Thank You.
Make it a combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries.
Add Animal Fries as a side too.
Add Battered Onion Rings as well.
Swap the bread to a gluten-free wrap.
Add a Can Sprite.
Add M&M Chocolate Chip cookie.
Actually, change the combo fries to Cajun Fries.
Remove the onion rings.
Add Hot Honey sauce.
Wait—cancel everything, I want to start over.
New order: All American.
Make it a triple patty.
Combo with Lemon Pepper Fries.
Add Onion Ring and Beef Bacon on the burger.
No mayo and no mustard on the burger.
Add a Glass Coke.
Also add Animal Fries, but hold the grilled onion on it.
That’s all.
